/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhwinfo_mainboard.so -o ../../libhwinfo_mainboard.so CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/mainboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/apple/mainboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/linux/mainboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/windows/mainboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/windows/utils/wmi_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/apple/utils/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_mainboard.dir/linux/utils/filesystem.cpp.o
